name: Lemon Snow with Golden Grand Marnier Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together gelatin and sugar in a medium mixing bowl.
2. Add lemon juice. Mix in boiling water until sugar and gelatin are dissolved.
3. Chill, stirring often, until the mixture mounds when dropped from a spoon.
- The mixture may be refrigerated or placed over a bowl of ice water with a dash of salt added to speed chilling.
4. When chilled, remove from the refrigerator or cold water bath.
5. Add egg whites and beat with an electric mixer until doubled in volume and the mixture mounds when dropped from a spoon (about 5-10 minutes on high speed).
6. Fold in lemon zest.
7. Spoon the mixture into 8 large wine goblets or dessert dishes.
8. Chill at least 3 hours to set.
- The dish will keep for 5 days in the refrigerator.
9. Shortly before serving, spoon about 3 tablespoons of Golden Grand Marnier Sauce over the top of each dessert.
10. Garnish with raspberries.
- Makes 8 servings.
